history.title: Company history
history.description: In September 2020, pursuant to the decision of the Board of the LLC “IMKON FINANS Microcredit Organization,” the company was transformed into a Joint-Stock Company “IMKON FINANS Microcredit Organization.”

supervisory_board.title: Supervisory Board
info_management: Exercises general management of the activities of the Joint-Stock Company 'IMKON FINANS Microcredit Organization'.
Acts as the governing body of the Company.
Accountable to the general meeting of shareholders on matters regarding the management of the Company.

management_body.title: Management Body
info_management: Defines the status of the Company's Management Body — the director's status, scope of authority, procedure for organizing activities, director's work, election (appointment), as well as rights and obligations.
The Director manages the day-to-day operations of the company and acts as the sole executive body of the company.
The Director is accountable to the supervisory board and the general meeting of shareholders.

contacts.address: 44A Amir Temur Street, Andijan City, Andijan Region, Republic of Uzbekistan

form.success: Your application has been sent successfully
form.error: An error occurred. Please try again.

services.title: Our Services
what_we_do: The microcredit organization primarily provides microfinance services.
In addition, it offers microloan and microleasing services.
The organization also operates in the field of agency services.

microfinance.title: Microfinance Services
items: Microcredits, microloans, microleasing, and agency services
Purchase and sale of debt obligations
Consulting and information services related to microfinancing
Consumer loans and other financial services in accordance with legislation

microcredits.title: Microcredits and Microloans
microcredits.footerAlert: Loans are only granted to individuals with a verified place of work and stable income

q2.a: The loan amount is determined based on the client's solvency.

q4.a: Repayment is made monthly in equal installments (annuity) or by the differential method.

q6.a: Passport, proof of income, and collateral documents.

agency-service.title: Agency Services
agency-service.content: On July 23, 2019, the Resolution of the President of the Republic of Uzbekistan No. PQ–4400 “On Measures to Increase the Accessibility of Microfinancial Services” was signed. In accordance with this resolution, starting from August 1, 2019, it is permitted to operate as an agent of microcredit organizations, banks, insurance companies, and other financial institutions

events.title: Events
events.description: The Joint-Stock Company Microfinance Organization 'IMKON FINANS' has been contributing to the development of small and medium-sized businesses, private entrepreneurship, and the steadily growing microfinance market in the Republic of Uzbekistan for over ten years.

videos.title: Videos
videos.description: The Joint-Stock Company Microfinance Organization 'IMKON FINANS' has been contributing to the development of small and medium-sized businesses, private entrepreneurship, and the steadily growing microfinance market in the Republic of Uzbekistan for over ten years.
